title: Rule Resolution and Flow Exceptions in Pega — Missing Rules, Flow Errors, and Assignment Failures
content:
# Rule Resolution and Flow Exceptions in Pega

## Rule Resolution Exceptions

### PRRuntimeException: Rule not found
- **Message**: `Cannot find rule [RuleType] [ClassName].[RuleName]`
- **Common causes**:
  - Rule doesn't exist in any ruleset version
  - Rule exists but not in the user's access group rulesets
  - Rule is checked out (locked) and not available
  - Ruleset version is locked/read-only and rule hasn't been promoted
- **Fix**: Verify the rule exists (search in Dev Studio). Check access group rulesets include the rule's ruleset. Check if the rule is checked out.

### PRRuntimeException: Multiple rules found (ambiguous)
- **Message**: `Ambiguous rule resolution — multiple candidates for [rule-name]`
- **Cause**: Multiple rules with the same name at the same specificity level, circumstancing conflict
- **Fix**: Check for duplicate rules. Review circumstancing. Use rule resolution tool: Dev Studio → Tools → Rule Resolution.

### PRRuntimeException: Circular rule reference
- **Message**: `Circular rule reference detected: [rule-A] → [rule-B] → [rule-A]`
- **Cause**: Two rules reference each other, creating an infinite loop during resolution
- **Fix**: Break the circular dependency. Restructure the rules to avoid mutual references.

## Flow Exceptions

### FlowException: No assignment target
- **Message**: `Cannot create assignment — no operator or workbasket specified for [shape-name]`
- **Cause**: Routing rule returned no valid target, workbasket doesn't exist, operator is disabled
- **Fix**: Check the routing rule or router activity. Verify the target operator/workbasket exists and is active.

### FlowException: Invalid transition
- **Message**: `No valid transition from [shape-A] to [shape-B]`
- **Cause**: Flow connector missing between shapes, condition on connector evaluates to false with no alternative path
- **Fix**: Check flow diagram for missing connectors. Add an "Otherwise" connector for decision shapes.

### FlowException: SLA configuration error
- **Message**: `SLA rule [sla-name] not found or misconfigured`
- **Cause**: SLA referenced in the flow doesn't exist, wrong class/name, SLA has invalid time settings
- **Fix**: Verify SLA rule exists and is in the correct class. Check urgency/deadline/goal time values.

### FlowException: Subprocess error
- **Message**: `Error executing subprocess [flow-name] in [shape-name]`
- **Cause**: Sub-flow has an error, sub-flow is missing, parameters not properly passed
- **Fix**: Test the sub-flow independently. Check parameter mapping. Verify the sub-flow exists.

## Assignment Exceptions

### AssignmentException: Worklist full
- **Message**: `Cannot assign to operator [operator-id] — worklist limit exceeded`
- **Cause**: Operator has too many open assignments (configurable limit)
- **Fix**: Increase worklist limit. Reassign some cases. Review workload distribution.

### AssignmentException: Work object locked
- **Message**: `Cannot assign — work object [case-id] is locked by [other-user]`
- **Cause**: Another user or process has the case open/locked
- **Fix**: Wait for the lock to release. Check SMA for lock holders. Force-release stale locks.

### AssignmentException: Routing failed
- **Message**: `Router [router-name] returned no valid operator`
- **Cause**: All operators in the workbasket are disabled, skill-based routing found no matching operator
- **Fix**: Check workbasket members. Verify operator skills match routing criteria. Add a fallback routing rule.

## Clipboard Exceptions

### ClipboardException: Page already exists
- **Message**: `Cannot create page [page-name] — it already exists on the clipboard`
- **Fix**: Use `Page-Remove` before re-creating. Or use `obj-Open` to update the existing page.

### ClipboardException: Property type mismatch
- **Message**: `Cannot set [property-name] — expected [type-A] but got [type-B]`
- **Fix**: Check property definition. Ensure the value matches the property type (text/integer/date/page).

### ClipboardException: Read-only property
- **Message**: `Cannot modify read-only property [property-name]`
- **Cause**: Trying to set an auto-populated (.px) property or a declared property
- **Fix**: Don't try to set auto-populated properties. For declared properties, modify the inputs instead.
